camTargetDmyPolyId.Wiki: Dummy poly ID that the camera locks onto

camTargetDist.Wiki: Camera distance from the locked point of interest

Target_RotationX.Wiki: X-axis rotation angle relative to the character's front view, in degrees

Target_RotationY.Wiki: Y-axis rotation angle relative to the character's front view, in degrees

Target_RotationZ.Wiki: Z-axis rotation angle relative to the character's front view, in degrees
